apod_title: Unusually Smooth Sections of Asteroid Itokawa
label: namecode - UNUSUALLY.SECTIONS | 06.936
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by Unusually Smooth Sections of Asteroid Itokawa. Why are parts of this asteroid's surface so smooth?  The answer seems likely to do with the dynamics of an asteroid that is a loose pile of rubble rather than a solid rock.  The unusual asteroid Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
